# wTotalLength

**Instance Property**

The length of this descriptor and all of its subdescriptors.

## Declaration

```swift
uint16_t wTotalLength;
```

## Getting the Properties

- **bLength**: The size of the descriptor.
- **bDescriptorType**: The type of the descriptor.
- **bNumDeviceCaps**: The number of separate device capability descriptors in the binary object store.
